title: Constituencies with Close Election Margins
description: Write a query to join constituency_info and election_results, then filter for constituencies where winning_margin is less than 50000. Return constituency, state, party, and winning_margin.

schema: CREATE TABLE constituency_info (constituency_id INTEGER, constituency TEXT, state TEXT)
CREATE TABLE election_results (constituency_id INTEGER, candidate TEXT, party TEXT, total_votes INTEGER, winning_margin INTEGER)
testCases.solutionQuery: SELECT c.constituency, c.state, e.party, e.winning_margin FROM constituency_info c INNER JOIN election_results e ON c.constituency_id = e.constituency_id WHERE e.winning_margin < 50000

schema: CREATE TABLE constituency_info (constituency_id INTEGER, constituency TEXT, state TEXT)
CREATE TABLE election_results (constituency_id INTEGER, candidate TEXT, party TEXT, total_votes INTEGER, winning_margin INTEGER)
testCases.solutionQuery: SELECT c.constituency, c.state, e.party, e.winning_margin FROM constituency_info c INNER JOIN election_results e ON c.constituency_id = e.constituency_id WHERE e.winning_margin < 50000
